name: Anti-Dragon Barding
description:
Consisting of long steel spikes projecting from light barding, anti-dragon barding helps to protect vulnerable mounts and livestock from massive aerial predators, including dragons, griffons, and rocs.

An animal companion wearing anti-dragon barding gains a +2 item bonus to its Fortitude DC and Reflex DC against attempts to grapple, reposition, shove, or trip it, and a creature that successfully Grapples the animal companion takes 1d4 piercing damage.
